author: y4rr
content:
Phase 1B (#985) value-parity attempt failed at strict loader's UnmappedFixtureKey check.

Verbatim panic: 'EfficientNet-B0: loader failed on well-formed fixture: invalid argument: EfficientNet-B0 value-parity loader: torchvision key "features.4.0.block.2.fc2.weight" has no mapping to a ferrotorch parameter and is not a declared BN buffer'

Root cause: ferrotorch-vision/src/models/efficientnet.rs documents impl as 'simplified' — uses standard Conv2d instead of MBConv (mobile inverted bottleneck = depthwise + pointwise + squeeze-excite). torchvision's efficientnet_b0 has 213 params + 98 fp_buffers; the panic key 'features.4.0.block.2.fc2.weight' is the SE fc2 layer. Ferrotorch's EfficientNet-B0 has neither SE nor BN.

Phase 1B test infra in place; tests #[ignore = "#992 ..."] until ferrotorch impl lands MBConv.
